description.ko: 주파수가 빈 공간에서 수정 같은 잔물결과 황금빛 빛의 궤적으로 고형화되는 소리의 시각적 발현.
description.en: A visual manifestation of sound where frequencies solidify into crystalline ripples and gold light trails in the void.

prompt: Cinematic 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Sonic Architect.' A central floating geometric core vibrates, generating complex #4169E1 royal blue waves and #FF4500 electric orange ripples that solidify into crystalline structures. The surrounding void is filled with #32CD32 green kinetic particles and #FFD700 gold light trails reacting to the sonic rhythm. Hyper-detailed ray tracing, intricate UI elements, 8k resolution.
